description: A package's metadata declares one license while its bundled LICENSE file is another, and the inventory trusts the metadata.
body: Failure mode: the inventory records the license from package metadata (package.json / setup.py classifier), but the component's actual bundled LICENSE text is different or dual-licensed, so the recorded obligation is wrong. Detection signals: the metadata license and the LICENSE-file SPDX identifier disagree; a component listed as MIT contains GPL text or vice versa; the inventory never reconciled metadata against bundled text. Do not trust declared metadata as the authoritative license. Safer fallback: reconcile every component's declared license against the SPDX identifier inferred from its bundled LICENSE file and treat any mismatch as a finding to resolve before release.
